scripts.import-db: npx ts-node --project tsconfig.scripts.json prisma/scripts/import-all.ts && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db-except-chat-related: npx ts-node --project tsconfig.scripts.json prisma/scripts/import-all-except-chat-related.ts && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:categories: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts Category ./prisma/exports/export-Category.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:users: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts User ./prisma/exports/export-User.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:personas: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts Persona ./prisma/exports/export-Persona.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:settings: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts Settings ./prisma/exports/export-Settings.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:switches: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts SettingsSwitch ./prisma/exports/export-SettingsSwitch.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:problems: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts Problem ./prisma/exports/export-Problem.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:transcripts: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts Transcript ./prisma/exports/export-Transcript.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:chat-templates: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts ChatTemplate ./prisma/exports/export-ChatTemplate.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:template-problems: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts ChatTemplateProblem ./prisma/exports/export-ChatTemplateProblem.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:chats: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts Chat ./prisma/exports/export-Chat.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:learning-sequences: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts LearningSequence ./prisma/exports/export-LearningSequence.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
scripts.import-db:messages: npx ts-node prisma/scripts/import-from-csv.ts Message ./prisma/exports/export-Message.csv && npm run fix-postgres-sequence
